{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.3,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 0.7,

    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Artifact presents a system with implicit contribution claims (novel combination of autoencoder + GMM for streaming log anomaly detection); assessing whether those claims are coherently framed is plausibly central to 'What do you think?'",
    "R1.2": "The pipeline has multiple chained design choices (sliding-window AE → 32-dim bottleneck → GMM scoring → fixed quantile threshold → validation-slice selection) whose internal logical consistency is a natural target for general feedback.",
    "R1.3": "Artifact asserts concrete quantitative claims (P=0.71, R=0.63, 312 labeled incidents, ~90 s detection latency, two additional clusters) against a specific evaluation setup; verifying those numbers are adequately grounded is a core plausible reading of the delegation.",
    "R1.6": "The prose is written almost entirely in run-on sentences without punctuation breaks; writing quality is a plausible primary concern under an open-ended 'What do you think?' ask."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Are you asking primarily for feedback on the technical soundness and evidence quality (methodology, claim support, evaluation design), or primarily on writing quality and prose clarity?"
}

rationale.R1.1: Artifact presents a system with implicit contribution claims (novel combination of autoencoder + GMM for streaming log anomaly detection); assessing whether those claims are coherently framed is plausibly central to 'What do you think?'
rationale.R1.2: The pipeline has multiple chained design choices (sliding-window AE → 32-dim bottleneck → GMM scoring → fixed quantile threshold → validation-slice selection) whose internal logical consistency is a natural target for general feedback.
rationale.R1.3: Artifact asserts concrete quantitative claims (P=0.71, R=0.63, 312 labeled incidents, ~90 s detection latency, two additional clusters) against a specific evaluation setup; verifying those numbers are adequately grounded is a core plausible reading of the delegation.
rationale.R1.6: The prose is written almost entirely in run-on sentences without punctuation breaks; writing quality is a plausible primary concern under an open-ended 'What do you think?' ask.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking primarily for feedback on the technical soundness and evidence quality (methodology, claim support, evaluation design), or primarily on writing quality and prose clarity?
